rationale: The user 'user-01$' accessed the IPC$ share (A0, EV-004, EV-005, EV-006, EV-007) and then accessed the SYSVOL share, specifically reading gpt.ini files from two different Group Policy Objects (EV-001, EV-002, EV-003). While IPC$ access can be benign, the subsequent access to SYSVOL and GPO files by a machine account ('user-01$') is unusual and could indicate reconnaissance for privilege escalation or lateral movement.
